name: AfdxGetLastErrorText
title: AfdxGetLastErrorText
syntax: long AfdxGetLastErrorText( dword bufSize, char[] buffer );
description: Gets the error code description of the last called Afdx... function.

parameters.name: bufSize
parameters.description: Size of buffer in which the description text is copied.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer in which the description text is copied.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
